events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Sir Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Legend Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today! What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: Anniversary of MTV's Launch
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched, forever changing music television with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? Today marks the anniversary of its launch, kicking off with The Buggles. What was the first music video that truly blew your mind?

events.title: Anniversary of Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in UK history.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago this month, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music and Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock festival of 'peace and music' kicked off. Imagine being there! Which artist would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the legendary Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His music continues to influence generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Remembering guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, and would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Jimi
angles.copy: Today we remember the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on rock music is simply immeasurable.

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', was originally released on September 26, 1969, featuring iconic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Something'.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary, let alone the music!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable lead singer of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true punk icon and rock legend.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam G Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid turns 54 today! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK Single Re-release
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was re-released in the UK in 1975, following its initial album release in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day, we celebrate the enduring message of John Lennon's 'Imagine', which saw a UK single re-release in '75. A timeless anthem for peace.

events.title: Anniversary of the first iPod's release
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Today marks the anniversary of Apple's game-changing device that put a thousand songs in your pocket. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling adventures, who's your favourite Bond and what's your top Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who was born on October 9, 1940, and would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the life and legacy of John Lennon. His message of peace still resonates.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite Cleese moment?
